title: Connect CRM deals to account, not contact
excerpt: Please provide an option to connect deals to accounts, not contacts. Contacts come and go, but our accounts/clients stay consistent. While I can understand having multiple deals with an account and that scenario meaning …

posts.author: RussK (Russ K)
posts.cookedHtml: Please provide an option to connect deals to accounts, not contacts. Contacts come and go, but our accounts/clients stay consistent. While I can understand having multiple deals with an account and that scenario meaning that separating deals by contact could make sense. However, it’s not always relevant to have a deal tied to a specific contact. We often have deals that involve 2-3 contacts that need to be equally tied to the deal. It would be more useful for us to just connect that deal to the account, rather than a contact. It shouldn’t be too difficult to offer both options.

posts.author: Artur_S (Artur Seidel)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree 100%. I was actually very surprised that deals are not linked to accounts first because, as you say, contacts come and go. This would help me a lot in making the system more useful.

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can do exactly that btw… Bust create a connect Boards column connecting Deals directly to contacts and remove the connect Boards column from Accounts.

I also never understood why Monday chose to go with Deals being connected to contacts

posts.author: IffeF (Stefan  Junestrand)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t understand, can you please explain how to connect Deals to Accounts.

posts.author: Dodomoon (davide.garbin@heikosrl.it)
posts.cookedHtml: can you please explain this method? thank you

posts.author: Just1n (🍉 Justin 🍉)
posts.cookedHtml:
Very much agree with this; Deals and Contacts are linked to an Account in real life.
If a Contact leaves an Account, the deal does not simply disappear!
